query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `convention_sessions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `convention_id` int NOT NULL,
  `studio_session_id` int,
  `title` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `session_type` enum('keynote','panel','workshop','breakout','networking','performance','qa','fireside_chat') DEFAULT 'panel' NOT NULL,
  `track` varchar(100),
  `room` varchar(100),
  `start_time` bigint NOT NULL,
  `end_time` bigint NOT NULL,
  `max_participants` int DEFAULT 50,
  `current_participants` int DEFAULT 0,
  `speakers` json,
  `is_recorded` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `recording_url` text,
  `status` enum('scheduled','live','ended','cancelled') DEFAULT 'scheduled' NOT NULL,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`convention_id`) REFERENCES `conventions`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `convention_attendees` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `convention_id` int NOT NULL,
  `user_id` int,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `role` enum('attendee','speaker','panelist','moderator','vip','sponsor','organizer') DEFAULT 'attendee' NOT NULL,
  `ticket_type` enum('free','general','vip','speaker','sponsor') DEFAULT 'free' NOT NULL,
  `registration_status` enum('pending','confirmed','checked_in','cancelled','refunded') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  `stripe_payment_intent_id` varchar(255),
  `checked_in_at` bigint,
  `platform` varchar(100),
  `avatar_url` text,
  `bio` text,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`convention_id`) REFERENCES `conventions`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `studio_recordings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `session_id` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `recording_url` text NOT NULL,
  `thumbnail_url` text,
  `duration_seconds` int DEFAULT 0,
  `file_size_mb` decimal(10,2),
  `format` enum('mp4','mp3','wav','webm','mkv') DEFAULT 'mp4',
  `is_published` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `view_count` int DEFAULT 0,
  `tags` json,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`session_id`) REFERENCES `studio_sessions`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
